violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Cook handled phone with gloved hands and then returned to food prep without hand wash or glove change. *Corrected on-site, observed good hand wash during rest of inspection.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Handle of scoop laying in bulk sugar.
Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Utensil was not suitable or dispensed effectively for self-service operations of ready-to-eat foods. -Bowl left in bulk flour to be used as scoop.

Reheating food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not reheated rapidly so all parts reached a temperature of 165F for 15 seconds within one hour. -Soup was placed into steam well to reheat at ~6:40 am. Found at 9:15am with temp of 110F. *Moved to burner cook top to finish reheat to 165.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Sliced turkey in prep table date marked 10/11 was not dated for thaw date. -Cooked ground sausage and sliced roast beef in 2 door cooler is not date marked. -Chili in walk in cooler dated 10/18 was not dated for thaw date.--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. -J cheese in walk in cooler dated 10/16. *Directed to dispose of product. -Sliced pepperoni in walk in cooler dated 10/10 *Voluntarily disposed of. -Ranch (made in-house) at bar cooler dated 10/19.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Cutting board at prep table is stained/due for deep clean/re-surface.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Chopper used for tomatoes and onions has dried food debris on blades.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Some residue at bottom shelf of stainless prep table. -Build up of frost at interior surfaces and in plastic containers of upright freezer at cookline. -Residue at door handles of 2 door glass cooler. -Residue build up at wire shelves in walk in cooler. -Spill in bottom of bar keg cooler. -Limescale build up at drain mat on clean side bar 3 comp sink. -Water/debris at bottle storage used in bar ice bin.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Floors and walls at pizza prep/ice machine area are not finished.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not maintained in good repair. -Tiles missing at floor in walk in cooler. -Frost build up at fans of walk in freezer.
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Method, temperature and time (5 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
